case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MTA VS. DAVID QUANG NGUYEN

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MTA
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO THE ORDER SIGNED ON 12/07/2021 BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MTA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-11-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-19-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY VIRGINIA HO, CLAIMS ADJUSTER FOR THE CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S METROPOLITAN TRANSIT AGENCY. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT DAVID QUANG NGUYEN. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY VIRGINA HO, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/7/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MTA AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, DAVID QUANG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
